Home / Services / Garage Door Spring Replacement

Garage Door Spring Replacement

Safe and efficient garage door spring replacement services in Sacramento.

Garage door springs are under immense tension and can be dangerous to handle without the proper tools and expertise. We offer professional garage door spring replacement services in Sacramento, ensuring the safety and proper functioning of your garage door. Sacramento's fluctuating temperatures can cause springs to weaken and break over time. We use only high-quality springs designed to withstand the rigors of daily use and the local climate. Our technicians are trained to safely remove and replace broken springs, ensuring proper balance and alignment of your garage door. We offer both torsion spring and extension spring replacement services. We understand the urgency of a broken garage door spring and strive to provide prompt service to get your door back in working order quickly. We prioritize safety and ensure all spring replacements are performed to the highest standards. Don't attempt to replace garage door springs yourself – contact us for safe and reliable service.

Our Process

  1. 01 Safety Assessment & Preparation
  2. 02 Removal of Broken Spring
  3. 03 Installation of New Spring
  4. 04 Tension Adjustment & Balancing

Benefits

  • Safe Operation
  • Proper Door Balance
  • Extended Door Lifespan
  • Reduced Risk of Further Damage

Frequently Asked Questions

How do I know if my garage door spring is broken?

Common signs include a loud snapping sound, a garage door that is difficult to lift, or a door that hangs unevenly.

How long do garage door springs typically last?

Garage door springs typically last between 7-12 years, depending on usage and maintenance. Regular lubrication can help extend their lifespan.

Why should I hire a professional to replace my garage door springs?

Garage door springs are under high tension and can be dangerous to handle. A professional has the tools and expertise to safely and properly replace them.
